text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 9 day(s) and scared. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 9 day(s) like this. I have a very high fever.
